top.title: Israeli strike in Gaza City kills new head of Hamas's military wing
top.summary: At least three people were killed in the attack, which came despite a ceasefire with Hamas being in place.

top.title: Dozens killed in Lebanon as Israel intensifies strikes
top.summary: Israel says it struck 100 Hezbollah infrastructure sites and fighters in Lebanon, after PM Benjamin Netanyahu vows to "crush" the Iran-backed group.

top.title: Nasa unveils next steps to build permanent Moon base
top.summary: Nasa plans to send hopping drones and roving vehicles to the Moon as part of plans for a permanent Moon base.

top.title: Champion ethical hacker warns AI tools like Mythos will make competing harder
top.summary: Chompie, one of the world's tops ethical hackers, says AI like Claude Mythos will make it harder for people like her to compete.

top.title: Instagram betting ads featuring Kane and Haaland banned
top.summary: The advertising watchdog said the adverts featuring top footballers had a strong appeal to under-18s.

top.title: Starmer vows to act on social media after meeting bereaved parents
top.summary: Some parents believe whether the government will take strong enough action remains to be seen.

title.#text: Did the Pope use AI to write about the dangers of AI?
NASA’s permanent Moon base plans start with three missions this year
Google Health is here, but a lot of people want their Fitbit app back instead
